queries.question: Give me the territories and cities that each sales representative is responsible for.
queries.sql: SELECT Territories.Name, Territories.OtherColumn1  from Sales_Representatives_Territories join Territories on Sales_Representatives_Territories.TerritoryID = Territories.RegionID join Sales_Representatives on Sales_Representatives_Territories.SalesRepID = Sales_Representatives.ID   GROUP BY Sales_Representatives_Territories.TerritoryID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Sales_Representatives_Territories.SalesRepID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Sales_Representatives)

queries.question: Give me the territories and cities that each sales representative is responsible for.
queries.sql: select sales_representatives.fullname , territories.name , territories.othercolumn1 from Sales_Representatives_Territories join Territories on Sales_Representatives_Territories.TerritoryID = Territories.RegionID join Sales_Representatives on Sales_Representatives_Territories.SalesRepID = Sales_Representatives.ID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname ?name ?othercolumn1 WHERE {
  ?sales_representatives_territories a :Sales_Representatives_Territories .
  ?territories a :Territories .
  ?sales_representatives_territories p:hasTerritories ?territories .
  ?sales_representatives a :Sales_Representatives .
  ?sales_representatives_territories p:hasSales_Representatives ?sales_representatives .
  ?sales_representatives p:name ?fullname .
  ?territories p:name ?name .
  ?territories p:OtherColumn1 ?othercolumn1 .
}

queries.question: What are the territories and cities where all sales reps work in together?
queries.sql: SELECT Territories.Name, Territories.OtherColumn1, Territories.OtherColumn2  from Sales_Representatives_Territories join Territories on Sales_Representatives_Territories.TerritoryID = Territories.RegionID join Sales_Representatives on Sales_Representatives_Territories.SalesRepID = Sales_Representatives.ID   GROUP BY Sales_Representatives_Territories.TerritoryID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Sales_Representatives_Territories.SalesRepID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Sales_Representatives)

queries.question: Give me the territory in which each sales rep works and the corresponding city.
queries.sql: select sales_representatives.fullname , territories.name , territories.othercolumn1 , territories.othercolumn2 from Sales_Representatives_Territories join Territories on Sales_Representatives_Territories.TerritoryID = Territories.RegionID join Sales_Representatives on Sales_Representatives_Territories.SalesRepID = Sales_Representatives.ID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname ?name ?othercolumn1 ?othercolumn2 WHERE {
  ?sales_representatives_territories a :Sales_Representatives_Territories .
  ?territories a :Territories .
  ?sales_representatives_territories p:hasTerritories ?territories .
  ?sales_representatives a :Sales_Representatives .
  ?sales_representatives_territories p:hasSales_Representatives ?sales_representatives .
  ?sales_representatives p:name ?fullname .
  ?territories p:name ?name .
  ?territories p:OtherColumn1 ?othercolumn1 .
  ?territories p:OtherColumn2 ?othercolumn2 .
}

queries.question: For each sales rep, list the cities of territories they cover.
queries.sql: select sales_representatives.fullname , territories.othercolumn1 from Sales_Representatives_Territories join Territories on Sales_Representatives_Territories.TerritoryID = Territories.RegionID join Sales_Representatives on Sales_Representatives_Territories.SalesRepID = Sales_Representatives.ID

queries.question: What are the cities of territories that are the same for all sales reps?
queries.sql: SELECT Territories.OtherColumn1  from Sales_Representatives_Territories join Territories on Sales_Representatives_Territories.TerritoryID = Territories.RegionID join Sales_Representatives on Sales_Representatives_Territories.SalesRepID = Sales_Representatives.ID   GROUP BY Sales_Representatives_Territories.TerritoryID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Sales_Representatives_Territories.SalesRepID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Sales_Representatives)

queries.question: Tell me the territories every sales rep covers.
queries.sql: SELECT Territories.Name  from Sales_Representatives_Territories join Territories on Sales_Representatives_Territories.TerritoryID = Territories.RegionID join Sales_Representatives on Sales_Representatives_Territories.SalesRepID = Sales_Representatives.ID   GROUP BY Sales_Representatives_Territories.TerritoryID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Sales_Representatives_Territories.SalesRepID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Sales_Representatives)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the territory in which each sales rep works and the corresponding city.
Show me the cities of territories every sales rep covers.
Give me the territories and cities that each sales representative is responsible for.
Tell me the territories every sales rep covers.
